place: Cherngtalay, Bang Tao, Thalang District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Waterfront Lagoon Pool Villa
blurb: A collection of waterfront pool villas set around a private lagoon in the heart of Bang Tao – Cherngtalay, Phuket. Three- to six-bedroom homes with double-volume living, floor-to-ceiling glass and a private pool opening to the water, plus access to a residents-only lake club. Off-plan, from ฿43,800,000.
detail:
Set in the lifestyle heart of Bang Tao – Cherngtalay, this is a collection of luxury waterfront pool villas arranged around a serene private lagoon and its creeks, framed by lush tropical hills. Each villa is conceived as an "island-urban residence": a calm, modern home that opens completely to the water.

The architecture centres on a double-volume living area wrapped in floor-to-ceiling glazing, drawing the lagoon and gardens inside and connecting seamlessly to a private pool and waterfront terrace. A warm, tropical material palette blends the homes into their surroundings, with assistance and back-of-house rooms considered so daily life runs effortlessly.

Five villa layouts span three to six bedrooms — from intimate three-bedroom homes of around 268 m² built area on compact lagoon plots, up to grand six-bedroom residences of roughly 1,000 m² on plots approaching 960 m². Every home is positioned for privacy and an uninterrupted water outlook.

Residents share a private, members-only lake club under a "waterside wellness" concept — a lap pool, kids pool, hydrotherapy zone, sauna and ice bath, a luxury gym and private studio, co-working lounge, outdoor sun decks and 24-hour security.

The setting is one of Phuket's most connected: about ten minutes to Bang Tao Beach, four minutes to Porto de Phuket and five minutes to Boat Avenue, with the island's dining, marinas and international schools close at hand. Offered off-plan from ฿43,800,000.

features.l: ≈4 min Porto de Phuket · 5 min Boat Avenue
